name: sancrev-marketplace
description: The SANCREV / GNOSYS plugin catalog for Claude Code — a thin reference catalog (tier 3) that POINTS at each plugin's own public repo (tier 2). Plugins are projected here from the private dev monorepo by the scalable-publishing pipeline; this catalog never houses their code.

plugins.name: doc-mirror
plugins.description: The doc-mirror claude system: a 1:1 documentation mirror of any codebase, maintained by an invariant STATE MACHINE (per-module doc(m) impl docs grounded in real code structure + a vision(m) backlog, 6 context/ index files, fork-on-change, no random documents). Bundles doc-mirror-boot + the {init,seework,change,prompts} state-skills + the install wizard + ship-a-plugin + make-ai-operating-system; the brainhook/session-start/transition-guard/readonly-guard hooks; and the journal/vision/tracker/commit/cursor CLIs.

plugins.name: promptworld
plugins.description: PromptWorld — the meta-compiler *World: a WrightMaster Engineer-CEO with every skill plus a native subagent per component type (skill / mcp / harness / operating_system / prompt / team / workflow) and 7 PromptGym specialist AIOS agents, that compile / compose / publish prompt systems through the nomicon. Bundles the install-promptworld deploy WIZARD (build the docker image, boot the container running the Engineer-CEO + PromptGym + the assistant-ui chat / Monaco file explorer / embedded terminal, then hand the user one URL), compile-a-world, and ingest-into-nomicon-app.
